markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.211 — Definition

In this subchapter, “port authority” means a port authority or navigation district created or operating under Section 52 , Article III, or Section 59 , Article XVI, Texas Constitution.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 967 (H.B.1305), Sec. 2, eff. June 17, 2011.*

subsections.text: In this subchapter, “port authority” means a port authority or navigation district created or operating under Section 52 , Article III, or Section 59 , Article XVI, Texas Constitution.
